modelResponses.text:
Here is the complete result:

## 🔍 Keyword Search Results from Google Drive Meeting Notes

  "query": "rollback",

    },

      "fileId": "drive-file-002",
      "fileName": "Incident Review Notes",
      "excerpt": "Avery: Document the rollback trigger and notify support before executing."

}
